author: nazarhussain
content: Posted some feedback on the PR.

author: barnabasbusa
content:
https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/764#discussion_r3093414254 <@604453604769923092> why would you suggest that these are protocol changes? 

Wouldn't it be just the same functionality under a different path?

author: nazarhussain
content:
If `engine_exchangeCapabilities` RPC endpoint and `POST /engine/v1/capabilities` REST endpoint have different response formats (which is currently docuemnted) that's inconsistency we should avoid. 

If we change the response format of `engine_exchangeCapabilities` that will be a ptorocol change.

author: funnygiulio
content: engine api does not cause protocol changes, its outside the protocol

author: funnygiulio
content: the response format is the whole point of the spec
